use_cases: Displaying multiple time-series datasets to compare trends over time periods
Visualizing analytics metrics with multiple series in dashboard widgets
Tracking financial or performance data across different categories
Showing data distribution patterns with gradient-filled area charts
ai_summary: A multi-series area chart component built with reaviz library for displaying multiple time-series datasets with smooth interpolation and gradient fills. Features linear axes, gridlines, and up to three data series with date-based x-axis and numeric y-axis. Designed for analytics dashboards and data visualization in SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce applications.
